mnemonics: MERN stands for MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js
MERN is a popular full-stack development framework
keyPoints: Server-less applications are built using MERN components
Express is a popular choice for server-side rendering
React is ideal for client-side rendering and UI development
Node.js provides a robust and scalable backend for MERN applications
Server-less functions in MERN are triggered by API calls
